name: BlueKCCommonNextPageStatusHistLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_initial AS (SELECT comm.COMM_ID, comm.COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, comm.COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, comm.COMM_SENT_DTM, comm.COMM_STTUS_CD, comm.LAST_UPDT_DTM AS CRT_DTM, comm.COMM_SK, comm.COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, comm.COMM_TRNSMSN_CT, comm.CRT_USER_ID, CAST(commhist.COMM_SENT_DTM AS VARCHAR(50)) AS COMM_SENT_DTM_HIST FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM] comm LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_CommTrnsmsnOwner}.[COMM_HIST] commhist ON comm.COMM_SK = commhist.COMM_SK AND comm.COMM_SENT_DTM = commhist.COMM_SENT_DTM WHERE comm.COMM_TYP_CD IN ('MAILRQST','MAILRSPNS','MAILDSPSTN')) SELECT cte_initial.COMM_ID, cte_initial.COMM_SRC_SYS_CD, cte_initial.COMM_TRGT_SYS_CD, cte_initial.COMM_SENT_DTM, cte_initial.COMM_STTUS_CD, cte_initial.CRT_DTM, cte_initial.COMM_SK, cte_initial.COMM_STTUS_CMNT_TX, cte_initial.COMM_TRNSMSN_CT, cte_initial.CRT_USER_ID FROM cte_initial WHERE cte_initial.COMM_SENT_DTM_HIST IS NULL

CALLED BY : BlueKCCommonNextPageMailFileSeq, NextPageBlueKCGdgCareRspnsDsptSeq


PROCESSING : Job inserts into COMM_HIST table with latest updates in COMM table.
